name: HitRECord on TV with Joseph Gordon-Levitt
original_name: HitRECord on TV with Joseph Gordon-Levitt
overview: A new take on the variety show where host Joseph Gordon-Levitt directs countless artists from his global online community — hitRECord — to create short films, live performances, music, animation, conversation, and of course, more! Each episode focuses on a different theme as Joe invites and encourages anybody with an internet connection to join him and contribute. Are you RECording?
